hero.description: Gurucraftpro blends AI-powered efficiency with human creativity to craft visuals that truly connect and communicate.

founder.name: Annu Dhanjeja
founder.title: Founder & Creative Lead
founder.main_description: Under Annu Dhanjeja's leadership, Annu Design Studio has pioneered the integration of AI-assisted workflows with traditional artistic principles, delivering high-impact visual identities for global brands.
bio: Annu Dhanjeja is a multidisciplinary artist and the founder of Annu Design Studio. With over a decade of experience in graphic design and video editing, she has built a studio that prioritizes clarity, beauty, and impact.
Her work explores the intersection of human intuition and generative technology, ensuring that every project maintains its 'soul' while benefiting from the speed and scalability of modern AI tools.

philosophy.title: Intelligence made visible.
philosophy.description: We believe that good design is a strategic advantage. Our core values guide every pixel we place and every decision we make.

ai_human.title: The Perfect Blend of Machine & Soul
ai_human.description: We don't just prompt and pray. We use AI as a high-speed engine, but humans steer the ship. This ensures your designs are delivered in record time without losing the emotional nuance that only a person can provide.

tools.title: Our Tech Stack
tools.description: We leverage the latest in AI and traditional design tools to stay ahead of the curve.
